name: AI Fan-out
description: Reference Agent: fan out one prompt across several models in parallel with Promise.all, then synthesize a single best answer ('best-of-N' / fusion). Shows the supported way to build fusion on Galactic — no special primitive required.

best_of_n.description: Fan a question out across several models in parallel, then fuse the drafts into one best answer. Returns the fused answer plus each draft and the total Light spent.

models.description: Optional list of model ids to fan out across (defaults to 3). Capped at 6 to respect the per-execution budget.
